CommunityApplications.Profile:
Community-maintained **Unraid Docker templates** for applications not yet listed in the official [Community Applications](https://unraid.net/community/apps) catalog.
### What you will find here
- Installable Docker template XML files under `templates/` - Authoring guides, validation scripts, and reference examples - Per-app setup notes under `docs/apps/`
### Maintained applications
| Template | Description | |----------|-------------| | **nornicdb-hermes-memory-cpu** | AMD64 CPU-only Hermes agent memory (BGE-M3, optional headless) | | **nornicdb-hermes-memory-gpu** | AMD64 GPU-accelerated Hermes memory (NVIDIA CUDA or Vulkan) | | **nornicdb-hermes-memory-apple-silicon** | Apple Silicon (M1/M2/M3/M4) Hermes memory with Metal GPU |
### Support
- **Issues:** https://github.com/RapalS/UNRAID_DOCKER_TEMPLATES/issues - **Docs:** https://github.com/RapalS/UNRAID_DOCKER_TEMPLATES/tree/main/docs
Optional: add your Unraid forum support thread URL in the `Forum` element below before final submission.
### License
Repository contents (templates, docs, metadata) are licensed under the **MIT License** — an [OSI-approved](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT) open-source license. Upstream container images remain under their own licenses.
